sources.sample: Claire Enterprise Online Update Governance System Core Principle Claire may discover, download, inspect, score, stage, and validate updates online.Claire may NOT modify active runtime code unless the update proves:1. forward architectural alignment,2. no regression of verified capabilities,3. no unsafe overwrite of protected paths,4. full rollback capability,5. validation success,6. human approval for critical changes. New Enterprise Modules to Add Create: src/claire/evolution/├── __init__.py├── project_identity.py├── master_document_registry.py├── version_timeline.py├── target_state.py├── capability_registry.py├── verified_state_store.py├── regression_guard.py├── forward_motion_policy.py├── evolution_memory.py└── evolution_orchestrator.py Create: src/claire/platform/update_governance/├── __init__.py├── authority_map.py├── package_inspector.py├── source_trust.py├── signature_verifier.py├
